mapper.select: SELECT aspect, SUM(CASE WHEN sentiment = 'positive' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS "positiveCnt", SUM(CASE WHEN sentiment = 'neutral' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS "neutralCnt", SUM(CASE WHEN sentiment = 'negative' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) AS "negativeCnt", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sentiment = 'positive' THEN cnt ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(cnt), 1) AS "positiveRatio" FROM t_aspect_sentiment WHERE platform = #{platform} AND product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY aspect ORDER BY aspect
SELECT DISTINCT aspect FROM t_aspect_sentiment ORDER BY aspect

SELECT p.platform, p.product_id AS "productId", p.product_name AS "productName", p.brand_name AS "brandName", p.category, p.avg_rating AS "avgRating", p.review_count AS "reviewCount", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.sentiment = 'positive' THEN a.cnt ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(a.cnt), 1) AS "positiveRatio" FROM t_product p JOIN t_aspect_sentiment a ON a.platform = p.platform AND a.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = #{category} AND a.aspect = #{aspect} AND p.review_count >= 20 GROUP BY p.platform, p.product_id, p.product_name, p.brand_name, p.category, p.avg_rating, p.review_count ORDER BY "positiveRatio" DESC, p.avg_rating DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
